title: lobelia irasuensis
intro: Lobelia irasuensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, commonly known as the Lobelia or Blue Lobelia. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lobelia irasuensis include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lobelia irasuensis include tinctures, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
